name: Rodrigues (Mauritius)
description: A white field bordered with red, yellow, green and blue stripes, bearing in the centre the coat of arms of Rodrigues with two white bird supporters and the motto 'Travail Solidarite Liberte'.
history: Flag of Rodrigues, an autonomous outer island of the Republic of Mauritius. The flag displays the island's coat of arms.

features.role: a border striped red, yellow, green and blue
the arms of Rodrigues with two white bird supporters and a motto scroll
